title: TaskBoard
description: Schema for .github/ai-state/task-board.json — the task board projection consumed by the Command Steward, orchestrator, state reconciler, and launch gate. Provides a machine-readable view of task lifecycle states (open/ready/running/blocked/done), claim ownership, heartbeat tracking, and stale worker detection. Aligned with docs/ai-native/task-board-projection.md.

markerVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the schema shape changes.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this projection was last written.

tasks.description: Task entries. Empty array when no tasks are tracked.

taskEntry.description: A single task in the board projection. Tracks lifecycle state, worker claim, heartbeat, and linked PR.

conflictGroup.description: Conflict group from task JSON. Used by the launch gate to detect scheduling conflicts.

worker.description: Worker details when state is ready, running, or blocked. null for open and done.

blockedReason.description: Human-readable reason when state is blocked. null otherwise.

linkedPR.description: PR number when a PR has been opened. null if no PR yet.

workerDetails.description: Details of the worker claiming this task.

claimant.description: Role that claimed the task (e.g. backend-programmer).

claimedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the task was claimed.

lastHeartbeat.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last heartbeat. Used for stale detection.

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the claim expires if not refreshed. Derived from task hardTimeMinutes.
